ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification code */,
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Code for classification */,
  "classification_desc" TEXT /* Description of classification */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification (e.g., HS, SITC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_flows" (
  "trade_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade flow code */,
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for trade flow */,
  "trade_flow_desc" TEXT /* Description of trade flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter country */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for reporter country */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of reporter country */,
  "reporter_iso" TEXT /* ISO code of reporter country */,
  "reporter_region" TEXT /* Region of reporter country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for partner country */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of partner country */,
  "partner_iso" TEXT /* ISO code of partner country */,
  "partner_region" TEXT /* Region of partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity code */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Code for commodity */,
  "commodity_desc" TEXT /* Description of commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of commodity (e.g., goods, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qty_units" (
  "qty_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity unit code */,
  "qty_unit_code" INTEGER /* Code for quantity unit */,
  "qty_unit_desc" TEXT /* Description of quantity unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qty_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alt_qty_units" (
  "alt_qty_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative quantity unit code */,
  "alt_qty_unit_code" INTEGER /* Code for alternative quantity unit */,
  "alt_qty_unit_desc" TEXT /* Description of alternative quantity unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alt_qty_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "trade_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "agreement_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade agreement */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement expires */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for reporter country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_procedures" (
  "customs_procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the customs procedure */,
  "procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the customs procedure */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for reporter country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customs_procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_trends" (
  "trade_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade trend */,
  "trade_flow_code" INTEGER /* Code for trade flow */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Code for commodity */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for reporter country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_offices" (
  "customs_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the customs office */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the customs office */,
  "reporter_code" INTEGER /* Code for reporter country */,
  "partner_code" INTEGER /* Code for partner country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customs_office_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each classification code
Unique identifier for each trade flow code
Unique identifier for each reporter country
Unique identifier for each partner country
Unique identifier for each commodity code
Unique identifier for each quantity unit code
Unique identifier for each alternative quantity unit code
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst)
Unique identifier for each user role
Unique identifier for each trade agreement
Unique identifier for each customs procedure
Unique identifier for each trade trend
Unique identifier for each customs office
